value.stringValue: You have been removed from account
{!$Record.Assigned_CSA_Name__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Assigned_CSA_Name__r.LastName} new account has been assigned to you

rules.name: Yes_Account_CS_or_AM_changed
rules.label: Yes, Account CS or AM changed

rules.label: Yes, AM changed from non-empty value

rules.name: Yes_CS_Changed_from_non_empty_value
rules.label: Yes, CS Changed from non-empty value

decisions.description: MIS-3492 - alert CS team when assigned CSA is being assigned
decisions.name: CSA
decisions.label: CSA

rules.label: Yes, Found previous CS team member

decisions.description: MIS-8304 Cannot change inactive account am
decisions.name: Has_Account_CS
decisions.label: Has Account CS?

Flow.description: MIS-8304 Cannot change inactive account am MIS-8109 - Account Team Member logic for CS and AM, Added AM sync with open opps MIS-8000 - Skip Subscription Renewal Date clear MIS-7541 - Subscription Renewal Date Updates MIS-7584 - Client Partner Account Team Member MIS-6912 - Removed Enrichment Process MIS-5335 - Rule AOU: Added previous owner isactive and not automations user MIS-4072 - Update related handover based on No Touch Account MIS-1663 *Rule (SE)* was added to send email alert to Account owner with requested profile
Flow.interviewLabel: Account- Record Triggered Flow - After Save {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Account- Record Triggered Flow - After Save

recordCreates.name: Create_Account_Team_Member_from_Update
recordCreates.label: Create Account Team Member from Update

recordUpdates.label: Copy Renewal Date To Subscription Renewal Date

recordUpdates.name: LPP_Update_Link_to_our_PP_on_Opportunity
recordUpdates.label: LPP - Update Link to our PP on Opportunity

textTemplates.name: CSA_assigmentremoval
textTemplates.text:
Hi,

A new CSS/CSA has been removed from the following account: {!$Record.Name}

Previous CSS/CSA : {!$Record__Prior.Assigned_CSA_Name__r.FirstName} {!$Record__Prior.Assigned_CSA_Name__r.LastName}

Additional information:

Country: {!$Record.BillingCountry}

SW Industry: {!$Record.SW_Industry__c}

Business Unit: {!$Record.Business_Unit__c}

Strat Region (if relevant): {!$Record.Strategic_Region__c}

Account link: {!Accountrecordlink}

textTemplates.name: NEWCSAwasassigned
textTemplates.text:
Hi,

A new CSS/CSA has been assigned on the following account: {!$Record.Name}

New CSS/CSA: {!$Record.Assigned_CSA_Name__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Assigned_CSA_Name__r.LastName}

Previous CSS/CSA : {!$Record__Prior.Assigned_CSA_Name__r.FirstName} {!$Record__Prior.Assigned_CSA_Name__r.LastName}

Additional information:

Country: {!$Record.BillingCountry}

SW Industry: {!$Record.SW_Industry__c}

Business Unit: {!$Record.Business_Unit__c}

Strat Region (if relevant): {!$Record.Strategic_Region__c}

Account link: {!Accountrecordlink}
